features.subtitle: From cardio to strength — every sport, every level, every goal

items.title: Running & Cardio
items.description: Running programs for every level — from 5K to marathon. Personalized plans with GPS coaching and heart-rate tracking.

items.title: Strength training
items.description: Bulking, cutting or toning — our certified coaches build a custom program tailored to your body type.

items.title: HIIT
items.description: Short, intense sessions to burn maximum calories and boost your metabolism for the long run in 20 to 30 min.

items.title: Cycling
items.description: Indoor and outdoor training with a power meter. From road racer to climber, a plan tailored to every profile.

items.title: Swimming
items.description: Stroke technique, triathlon prep, open water — progress in every style with HD video drills.

items.title: CrossFit
items.description: Daily WODs, functional movements and community challenges to push your limits every week.

items.title: Yoga
items.description: Flexibility, inner strength and mindfulness — from beginner flows to advanced yoga for a balanced body and mind.

items.title: Boxing
items.description: Technique, cardio and power — from the basics to advanced combinations to transform you physically and mentally.

items.title: Stretching
items.description: Mobility, flexibility and optimal recovery — guided stretching routines to prevent injuries and perform.

items.title: Nutrition
items.description: Personalized meal plans, macro tracking and nutrition strategies to reach your athletic goals.

items.text: "In 3 months on the Xenotif® program, I beat my marathon record by 18 minutes. The AI coaching is stunning — every session is perfectly calibrated to my level."
"I lost 12 kg in 4 months while getting stronger. The HIIT + strength sessions are perfectly balanced. The Xenotif® community motivates me every morning."
"Triathlon prep with Xenotif® — incredible result. I finished my first Ironman thanks to this platform. Thank you Xenotif®!"

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.a: Absolutely. Xenotif® offers programs for every level, from complete beginner to seasoned athlete. Our AI tailors every program to your profile from sign-up — level, goals, availability.

items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, with no conditions or hidden fees. You can cancel from your member area in 2 clicks. Access stays active until the end of the paid period.

items.q: How does the AI coaching work?
items.a: Our AI analyzes your profile (level, goals, available time, any injuries) and generates a custom program. It adapts every week based on your feedback and performance.

items.q: Do I need any specific equipment?
items.a: No. Xenotif® offers sessions adapted to any equipment — at the gym, at home, or outdoors. When choosing your program, you indicate what you have available.

items.q: What does the money-back guarantee cover?
items.a: If you're not satisfied within the first 30 days, we refund you in full — no questions asked. Just contact us at contact@xenotif.com.

items.q: Do the programs work on mobile?
items.a: Yes. Xenotif® is fully responsive and accessible on smartphone, tablet and computer. Your sessions follow you everywhere, even offline (offline mode available on the Pro plan).

smartwatch.title: Smartwatch
smartwatch.subtitle: Real-time fitness sync
smartwatch.connectDesc: Sync your smartwatch to display your real health data — steps, calories, heart rate, sleep and much more.
smartwatch.securityDescShort: Your health data is encrypted and stored on secure servers in Europe. No data is ever sold to third parties.
smartwatch.securityDescLong: Your health data is encrypted and stored on secure servers in Europe. You can delete all your data anytime from your profile. No data is ever sold to third parties.
aiRecs: You've hit 84% of your step goal today — a 10-min sprint is all it takes to wrap it up!
Your sleep is slightly under 7h. Go to bed 30 min earlier tonight to optimize your recovery.
Hydration at 87% — drink 250ml before your next workout to maintain performance.
Your resting heart rate of 58 bpm indicates excellent cardiovascular fitness. Keep it up!
smartwatch.supportedDesc: Connect your watch to automatically sync your fitness data after every session.
smartwatch.noSessionsHint: Connect your watch to see your history.
smartwatch.dailyGoalsDesc: Your goals update in real time from your smartwatch.
